items.title: Apple names new chief executive to replace Tim Cook
items.summary: John Ternus will take over running the technology giant as Cook steps up to become executive chairman.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in seven new countries
items.summary: Google is rolling out Gemini in Chrome in Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Google brings Gemini in Chrome to users in Australia, Japan, Singapore and South Korea
items.summary: After debuting in the US, Gemini in Chrome is making its way to more markets. Starting today, Google is rolling out Chrome's built-in chatbot to users in countries in East Asia...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
